failures.description: The agent misread the ProductCatalogSearch output, treating two matching items priced above $233.90 as if they were below the threshold and concluding there were no matches.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal and plan were correct: use ProductCatalogSearch and answer from returned evidence. The relevant tool output was available at index 3 and showed count=2 with prices 272.33 and 237.48, both greater than 233.90. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite conclusion, saying no items match. This directly contradicts the tool result and was not resolved later; the Evaluator reinforced the same incorrect reading.
